evals.prompt: Grill me on my plan to split our Django monolith into 8 microservices over the next 6 months. We have a team of 5 devs and ~200k LOC.
evals.expected_output: A single first question following the output template (### [N]. [Topic Title] with Question and Recommendation), using AskUserQuestion tool. Should NOT ask multiple questions or deliver a final verdict.

assertions.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool

evals.prompt: Grill me on the architecture of this skills repo — I'm thinking of adding a CI/CD pipeline that auto-runs evals on every PR.
evals.expected_output: First explores the codebase, then asks a single focused question with recommendation using the output template.

assertions.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
Agent explored the codebase before asking (mentions files or structure found)

evals.prompt: Quiero que me hagas el grill. Voy a reemplazar nuestro sistema de auth actual (sesiones con cookies) por JWT + refresh tokens. Somos una app FastAPI con ~10k usuarios activos.
evals.expected_output: A single first question in the output template format, with recommendation. May use WebSearch before asking. Should not jump to conclusions.

assertions.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
